code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      ()
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          mut c = 0
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(x)
            c = x
          when None
            c = 0
          end
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted
        if x <= v
          result = list.push(result, x)
          inserted = true
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn insertion_sort(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = insert_sorted(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        s = "#{v}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let nums = parse_ints(line)
    let sorted = insertion_sort(nums)
    println(format_list(sorted))
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
